temporal_description: A man with short, dark hair, dressed in a black jacket, stands in the dark next to an open car door at night. He holds a phone to his ear, his expression serious and focused as he looks off-camera. The background is dark, with the silhouette of trees and a single streetlight visible. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera holds a steady medium shot on the man. The audio opens with a man letting out a short, dismissive scoff, "Hmph." The scene cuts to a close-up of an older man with graying hair, wearing a suit. He is also on the phone, holding it to his ear. The background is a dimly lit, greenish-hued interior, possibly an office or a room in a building. The same white Chinese characters, "风行网," appear in the top left corner. His voice is low and filled with a sense of disappointment and slight annoyance as he speaks in Mandarin, "Here, not even a ghost is visible." The camera is tight on his face, capturing his concerned and intense expression. The shot changes to a close-up of a third man with dark, disheveled hair and a mustache. He looks down and to the side with a somber and weary expression. He is in a dark, green-lit environment, with what appears to be a metal grate or fence in the background. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," are still visible in the top left corner. The camera is focused tightly on his face, emphasizing his melancholic mood. Throughout the clip, a low, tense, and atmospheric musical score plays in the background, creating a suspenseful and serious mood.
